# P&L Home Group
> Northern Virginia's premium outdoor living design and project management firm. Based in Leesburg, VA.

P&L Home Group designs, plans, and coordinates outdoor living and interior remodeling projects across Northern Virginia and the Shenandoah Valley. Victor Pastor is the owner and lead designer — he is on-site for every project. All construction is performed by licensed, vetted subcontractors. Fixed-price contracts. 2-year workmanship warranty. 47+ five-star Google reviews.

**Phone:** 703-638-8692  
**Email:** victor@plhomegroup.com  
**Location:** Leesburg, VA 20176  
**License:** Virginia Class A Contractor (DPOR Verified)  
**Service Area:** Loudoun County, Fairfax County, Prince William County, Shenandoah Valley

## What We Do

- Patio design and installation (pavers, flagstone, stamped concrete, natural stone)
- Outdoor kitchen design and build
- Deck design and construction (Trex, TimberTech, Fiberon composite; pressure-treated; hardwood)
- Fire pit and outdoor fireplace installation
- Retaining walls (Belgard, Techo-Bloc, Unilock)
- Pergola and shade structure installation
- Landscape lighting (SixFive Audio authorized dealer/installer)
- Outdoor audio systems
- Fence installation
- Interior remodeling (kitchen, bathroom, basement)
- Hardscape and concrete work
- Grading and drainage solutions

## Our Guarantees

1. Fixed price in writing before work begins — no change orders, no surprises
2. Victor Pastor on site for every project
3. 2-year workmanship warranty in writing
4. 3D design included with planning deposit (credited 100% to project)
5. Timeline accountability — credited if missed without cause

## Brand Partners

Belgard, Techo-Bloc, Unilock, Trex, TimberTech, Fiberon, SixFive Audio

## Service Cities

Leesburg, Ashburn, Herndon, Reston, Sterling, Chantilly, Fairfax, Vienna, McLean, Great Falls, Centreville, Gainesville, Haymarket, Purcellville, Round Hill, Middleburg, Berryville, Winchester, Front Royal, Strasburg, Woodstock, Warrenton, Brambleton, Aldie

## Pricing Context

Patio installation: $12–$45+ per sq ft depending on material. Average project $15,000–$45,000.  
Decks: $18,000–$60,000+ depending on size and material.  
Outdoor kitchens: $25,000–$80,000+.  
Fire pits: $3,500–$15,000.  
Retaining walls: $50–$120 per sq ft.

## Why P&L Home Group

Most contractors in Northern Virginia subcontract work without transparency, use change orders freely, and are unreachable after problems arise. P&L Home Group operates as a design and project management firm — Victor is the single point of accountability. One person. One contract. One price. Every project.
